emails.subject: Re: Medusa Cover Letter
emails.body: Re: Medusa Cover Letter Ken, I am forwarding the initialed cover letter with the changes included. Please revise the body of the proposal to also reflect the changes made to the cover sheet. Let me know if you have any questions. Ken Loch@ENRON 03/20/2001 02:51 PM
